summary: Unit tests for buildLLMClient function: validates OpenRouter provider, Ollama provider (with health check and model verification), empty provider, and unknown provider error cases
side_effects: Launches test HTTP servers (httptest.NewServer) for Ollama health check and model list endpoints
config_deps: Uses config.LLMConfig struct with fields: Provider, Model, OllamaURL, OpenRouterAPIKey, OpenRouterBase, TimeoutSeconds
notes: Tests the buildLLMClient() function exported from main.go. Uses httptest.NewServer to mock Ollama server responses for local model testing. Covers both happy paths (OpenRouter, Ollama healthy) and error paths (UnknownProvider, MissingModel).
